prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document provides specific statistics, trends, and assessments regarding agricultural land use, production, and environmental impacts, explicitly stating that it pertains to England. Additionally, the data sources referenced are primarily from the Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs, which oversees these matters in England.
